title: Polished Polish Salmon Pudding
description: A sweet, tender salmon pudding that showcases Polish flavors with a biscuit base and infused oil. It is a pescatarian-friendly dessert that balances savory and sweet.
instructions: Crush the biscuits into fine crumbs and mix with melted butter.
Press the crumb mixture into the bottom of 12 silicone muffin cups and bake for 10 minutes until set.
Heat 1 tbsp oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add the salmon fillet and cook gently, flipping once, for about 8 minutes until opaque.
Transfer the cooked salmon to a blender, then add yogurt, honey, lemon zest, dill, salt, pepper, and the infused olive oil.
Spoon the salmon mixture into the cooled biscuit cups, filling each halfway.
Chill the pudding in the refrigerator for 30 minutes to set.
Serve chilled, garnished with a sprig of dill if desired.
